productDisplayName: Doodle Boy's Stripper Green Teen Kidswear
description: CompositionGreen V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, short sleeved with white stripes and ribbing round the neckline, brand name appliquéd on the left chest and patchwork in contrast on the right chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycleDo not bleachTumble dry low or lay flat to dryWarm iron when neededDo not iron on printImbibe the spirit of Sports in your little man with this t-shirt from doodle. Let him learn the spirit of sports by playing various games with his friends, while doodle takes care of keeping him cool and comfortable. Team this with capris and sneakers for an even more sporty look.
